events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the disconnect not being within sight of the motor/driven machinery violates NEC 430.102(B) (absent documented use of the lockable-in-open-position exception), so the inspection **fails** with **high risk** due to the unexpected re-energization/shock hazard, pending relocation or a properly marked lockable disconnect.
